repo.description: Q-GaLore: Quantized GaLore with INT4 Projection and Layer-Adaptive Low-Rank Gradients.

terms.context_snippet: This repo contains the pre-release version of Q-GaLore algorithm, proposed by [Q-GaLore: Quantized GaLore with INT4 Projection and Layer-Adaptive Low-Rank Gradients](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.08296).
